fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 7 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-12. Projects: repo-copilot, agent-feed-optimization. Top concepts: AFO protocol content-layer proof, Scenario C baseline 14/18, Space 17/18, protocol works without special instructions, SEO analogy confirmed, Scenario B gap test next, archive_block, bootstrap URL pattern, gist template, G-000 v0.2 URL-First Inspection.

notes.title: AFO Scenario C: protocol works at content layer — key finding
notes.decisions: Scenario C calibration run complete. Baseline (no Space, no G-000): ~14/18. AFO Space (G-000 v0.2): ~17/18. KEY FINDING: high baseline PROVES the protocol — the README + structured files did the work without any special agent instructions. Any LLM in any conversation surfaces AFO-structured content better. The G-000 Space is power-user mode (parses file contents, outputs full context-cookie JSON, cites policy), but the floor is already high. This is the SEO analogy landing: structure your site correctly and any LLM discovers it better — no LLM adoption required. The test was self-handicapped intentionally — if the Space had vastly outperformed it would mean the content profile was weak; close scores mean content is strong. NEXT: Scenario B — real-world repo with no AFO files. Baseline near zero expected. Gap = sales argument to website owners.
notes.open_questions: Does Scenario B delta hold for repos that have partial AFO (e.g. just llms.txt but no agent-context)? What is the minimum viable AFO surface for a meaningful baseline lift?

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL pointing to identity gist, not generated text. Build order finalized across 4 phases. Notion Roadmap DB is next build step.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking? space-card backend: serverless function or GitHub Action?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with append_note as slot 3. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid. Work splits across turns if slot 3 is needed for brain push.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same turn-level mandate.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone + brain.json read primitive
notes.decisions: adapter_ref field added to QA.Stone gist block. G-008 ALERT type formalized. Charlie agent slot seeded. notion-ops registered as first live SKILL Stone.
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started. notion-ops SKILL Stone gist_id is null — needs a real gist.github.com wormhole.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push before Three Agents Demo. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB. append_note is canonical session-end write primitive.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive (G-010 gist export Action)?
